message:
feat(search-v3): implement rollout flags and shadow-comparison mode (br-2tnl.8.1)

Add comprehensive Search V3 rollout configuration with safe operational controls:

- Expand SearchEngine enum: Legacy, Lexical, Semantic, Hybrid, Auto, Shadow (deprecated)
- Add SearchShadowMode enum: Off, LogOnly, Compare
- Add SearchRolloutConfig with kill switches for semantic/rerank tiers
- Support per-surface engine overrides via AM_SEARCH_ENGINE_FOR_<TOOL_NAME>
- Create rollout.rs module with ShadowComparison metrics and RolloutController

Environment variables:
- AM_SEARCH_ENGINE: legacy|lexical|semantic|hybrid|auto (default: legacy)
- AM_SEARCH_SHADOW_MODE: off|log_only|compare (default: off)
- AM_SEARCH_SEMANTIC_ENABLED: false|true (kill switch, default: false)
- AM_SEARCH_RERANK_ENABLED: false|true (kill switch, default: false)
- AM_SEARCH_FALLBACK_ON_ERROR: true|false (default: true)

10 unit tests for rollout controller and shadow comparison logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
